deck: 17 cards — including Immolate+, Limit Break+ (upgraded F40), Flex+, Heavy Blade, and others
relics: 9 relics including Snecko Eye (Act 2 boss), Gambling Chip, Bronze Scales
victory_info: Donu and Deca (Act 3 Boss), Floor 51, Score 703, Final HP 4/85
key_moments: Snecko Eye again as Act 2 boss relic -- 2nd consecutive win with it.
Limit Break+ upgrade at F40 campfire was the most impactful decision -- enabled infinite Str doubling.
Flex+ into Limit Break+ gave 10 Str on Turn 4 of boss fight.
Duplication Potion on 0-cost Immolate+ dealt 60 AOE Turn 3.
Snecko Oil Turn 1 expanded hand to 10 cards.
Bronze Scales killed Deca at 4 HP from its own attacks.
Fairy in a Bottle saved the run vs Spikers/Guardians.
Gambling Chip improved Turn 1 hands by mulliganing expensive Snecko Eye draws.
lessons: Snecko Eye + Immolate+ + Limit Break is the confirmed winning formula (2 consecutive wins).
Limit Break+ upgrade is the #1 campfire priority approaching Act 3 boss.
Flex+ has real value with Limit Break+ (temporary Str gets doubled into permanent).
Gambling Chip + Snecko Eye is a powerful consistency combo.
Bronze Scales can deliver killing blows at very low HP.
Zero UI misplays -- sixth consecutive clean run.
